narrative: As an Applied ML Engineer with 5 years of experience at CRED, this candidate stands out primarily due to their exceptional JD-relevant skill match for our Senior AI/ML Engineer role. Their profile showcases deep expertise in Search & Retrieval technologies like QLoRA, Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, LlamaIndex, and Weaviate, directly aligning with our core requirements. Their experience level and background at a product-first company are strong fits, and their Gurgaon location is suitable for our Noida office. This strong alignment positions them highly for the role. However, minor profile credibility concerns were flagged, requiring further verification.
